guardrails: This artifact records reviewer-facing A4 capture execution only; it does not claim A4 acceptance.
Every captured review item remains pending_a4_review until an A4 reviewer records end-to-end UX acceptance evidence.
W1.5.199 refreshes pending stream and bridge capture inputs with FR-017 Task Drawer artifact evidence without changing accepted FR status.
No accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, packaging, updater, or baseline docx change is included in W1.5.199.

Capture artifacts must remain sanitized and must not include raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, query/hash secrets, response bodies, secure paths, cache paths, or output directory values.
The committed matrix artifact is a sanitized manifest only; screenshots and per-case raw output files stay outside Git.

bridge_command_evidence.evidence_scope: execution mode control placement, run-once dispatch surface, and preload contract coverage
runtime project creation endpoint and mandatory Git initialization evidence
runtime reference import, list, enable, disable, and view endpoint evidence
runtime-backed Chat instruction dispatch, current-node/global scope controls, metadata-only local receipt, and no-current-node fallback prevention
selected-node Task Drawer artifact metadata display, node-bound artifact action dispatch, and metadata-only command evidence

missing_before_acceptance: A4 reviewer has not recorded first-viewport collapsed stream acceptance.
Phase-level UX recording is still missing.
A4 reviewer has not accepted the full expanded event taxonomy as an end-user path.
Real workflow stream demo evidence is still missing.

observed_evidence_fields: unknown cases: fallback label remains visible without raw payload exposure
missing_before_acceptance: A4 reviewer has not accepted final user-facing labels for every event class.
Phase-level demo stream evidence is still missing.

observed_a4_evidence_inputs: Execution mode controls for step, semi_auto, and auto are visible near run actions.
Step mode dispatch records method, path, run id, node id, status, status code, and blocked reason only.
Semi-auto and auto modes remain fail-closed for run-once when the accepted backend contract does not support them.
A4 capture must show no raw response body, prompt, model output, or arbitrary payload values.
missing_before_acceptance: Backend run-once execution success has not been proven end-to-end from the desktop workbench.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for execution mode placement and behavior is not recorded.

observed_a4_evidence_inputs: Project creation success is blocked unless git_initialized is true and first_commit_sha is non-empty.
Reviewer evidence includes the desktop create-project path and runtime project endpoint coverage.
A8 git-history audit remains required before FR-012 acceptance.
A4 capture must not expose secure paths, cache paths, raw uploaded content, or credentials.
missing_before_acceptance: A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit/tag behavior is not recorded.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the mandatory Git path is not recorded.

observed_a4_evidence_inputs: Reference import/list/enable/disable/view controls are available from the desktop workbench.
Reference state changes are backed by runtime reference endpoints and manifest safety checks.
Delete semantics remain out of A4 scope until accepted spec material defines them.
A4 capture must not retain raw file content, secure paths, cache paths, or uploaded-file bytes.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for reference import, enable, disable, and view user paths is not recorded.
Delete semantics remain intentionally out of scope until accepted spec material defines them.

observed_a4_evidence_inputs: Bottom Chat Box exposes Workflow and Current node scope controls.
Workflow-scope submit routes to the accepted runtime submit-instruction endpoint without nodeId.
Current-node submit routes to the accepted node-scoped submit-instruction endpoint with structured nodeId.
Runtime command projection and renderer snapshots remain metadata-only and do not retain raw instruction text.
No selected/active node disables Current node scope rather than falling back to the first canvas node.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the runtime-backed current-node/global Workflow Chat instruction path is not recorded.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain outside this evidence refresh and must not be inferred from local receipt metadata.

observed_a4_evidence_inputs: Task Drawer exposes selected-node artifact metadata from runtime StreamEvent artifact_refs.
Task Drawer artifact controls dispatch open/download through the accepted ArtifactActionRequest path with run_id and node_id metadata.
Renderer command evidence remains metadata-only and does not include artifact body, raw bytes, full destination path, secure path, cache path, or output directory values.
Desktop native handoff remains covered by W1.5.195 preload/main tests and runtime_actions/http_sse contract anchors.
missing_before_acceptance: A4 UX acceptance evidence for node artifact detail display and safe open/download behavior is not recorded.
